prompt: Hey, can you organize my agency folder? It's at /Users/clay/Desktop/donjon.agency — it's gotten pretty messy. I want to see what's there, what should be archived, and get it cleaned up.

assertions.description: Uses agency-standard taxonomy (clients/, projects/, assets/, docs/, agents/, archive/) in proposed structure
Explicitly stops at Phase 2 (proposal) and asks for approval before moving any files
Identifies Jacob PDFs/ZIPs as client deliverables and routes them to clients/jacob/deliverables/ (not sales/ or docs/)
Identifies archive candidates including old reports (kitchen-checks, t-0027, servicepro) and deliverable ZIPs/PDFs
Groups proposed moves by destination folder (not just a flat list of individual file moves)
Flags ambiguous or unclear items (like duplicate infographics, unknown client assignments) for user decision
Proposes consolidating the two existing archive folders (ARCHIVE/ and (ARCHIVE)agent-files/) into one
